data.title: GREEN: Integrate overlay findings into resolution loop with single-writer compliance
data.description:
## Description
Integrate overlay findings into the existing autonomous resolution loop.

### Implementation
1. Overlay findings at critical/important severity enter the resolution loop and block the commit
2. Minor findings create tracking tickets via .claude/scripts/dso ticket create
3. Findings are aggregated by the dispatch orchestrator and written through write-reviewer-findings.sh (single-writer path)
4. Overlay agents do NOT write directly to reviewer-findings.json

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md (resolution integration section)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-overlay-resolution-integration.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED: 0"
- [ ] Resolution integration documented
  Verify: grep -q "overlay.*resolution\|resolution.*overlay" plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md
- [ ] Single-writer compliance documented
  Verify: grep -q "single-writer\|aggregated.*orchestrator" plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md
